intro: The clearest split between Cerbos and Corbado is how they charge: Cerbos uses a free tier plus paid plans starting around $0/month, while Corbado uses pricing from $1. Cerbos is Open-source authorization service with human-readable YAML policies, RBAC/ABAC, and REST/gRPC evaluation endpoints; it fits best for Apps, B2B. Corbado specializes in Passkey Authentication; it fits best for Apps, B2B. Pick Cerbos for Apps, B2B; pick Corbado for Apps, B2B. Cerbos is not for internal, static projects. Corbado is not for internal, static projects. Honest trade-offs: Cerbos is weak for internal tools with basic auth, and Corbado is weak for internal tools with basic auth — match to your real scenario. Both sit under the Identity / Auth / User Management umbrella, so your final call depends on pricing transparency, integration effort, and which listed not-for situations you can actually tolerate. On pricing, Cerbos uses a free tier plus paid plans starting around $0/month and Corbado uses pricing from $1, which materially changes total cost at scale.
quick_take: Cerbos is for apps, b2b; Corbado is for apps, b2b; decide based on pricing model.
verdict_a: Choose Cerbos if you want a free tier plus paid plans starting around $0/month and your workload matches apps, b2b.
verdict_b: Choose Corbado if you want pricing from $1 and your workload matches apps, b2b.

faq.a: A direct comparison depends on your usage profile and which pricing model fits better. Cerbos has a free tier with paid plans starting at $0/month. Corbado pricing starts at $1.

faq.q: Can I migrate from Cerbos to Corbado?
faq.a: Migration from Cerbos (low lock-in) to Corbado (medium lock-in) is the harder direction; the reverse is easier. Plan for data export, re-integration of SDKs, and re-testing flows before cutover. Verify exportable formats and feature parity against your live use cases before committing.

Cerbos scores higher on developer experience (5/5 vs 3/5 for Corbado). Evaluate against your own stack: read their docs, run a quick SDK spike, and check error handling. Self-assessing with a small prototype beats trusting any rating at face value.

faq.q: Is Corbado a good alternative to Cerbos?
faq.a: Corbado sits in the same category as Cerbos, so it can be a reasonable alternative for overlapping use cases. Corbado is best fit for apps, b2b. Note: Corbado is not for internal, static projects.
